---
title: "Factual Consistency & Hallucination"
subtitle: "When LLMs make things up — and when they don't know they're making things up"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Section Status
This section is being populated by literature research. Content will be updated.
:::

## Overview

*[Research in progress — will be populated with papers, preprints, blog posts, and resources on hallucination, factual consistency, and knowledge reliability in LLMs.]*

## Key Papers

*[To be populated]*

## Preprints & Emerging Work

*[To be populated]*

## Blog Posts & Practitioner Resources

*[To be populated]*

## Datasets & Benchmarks

*[To be populated]*

## Key Takeaways

*[To be populated]*

---

← [Taxonomy](taxonomy.qmd) | Next: [Self-Consistency & Contradiction](self-consistency.qmd) →
